response.justification: The candidate presents an exceptionally strong profile, significantly exceeding the 6+ years of experience requirement with a rich history in full-stack development, including senior and staff-level roles. Their direct experience with AI agent infrastructure, extensive work across TypeScript, Node.js, React, cloud platforms (AWS, Kubernetes), and robust testing practices aligns almost perfectly with the role's demanding technical requirements and primary stack.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with senior/staff-level contributions.
Direct experience in AI agent infrastructure and developer tooling.
Strong proficiency in core technologies (TS, Node, React, Cloud, Containerization, Testing).
concerns: Nest.js and Vitest are not explicitly mentioned in the primary stack.
No explicit mention of experience with authentication/authorization best practices.
Kotlin experience is not explicitly detailed, though Java is present.
